text.title: IndieHackers Strategy Examples
text.summary: Successful 12-month IH maker journey with approach and results; failed promo-first example with mistakes and consequences.

example.note: Developer building an email productivity tool; 12 months of consistent participation and build-in-public.
example.code:
Approach: - Posted helpful answers daily for 1 month before product mention - Monthly transparent updates (revenue, wins, failures) - Asked specific feedback questions with screenshots - Celebrated milestones publicly with learnings - Applied for IH podcast after hitting $10K MRR
Results after 12 months: IH followers: 2,000 Signups from IH: 500 Paying customers from IH: 50 IH podcast feature: 1 episode Community reputation: recognized domain expert

example.note: Maker with no prior participation submitted a promotional post on day one.
example.code:
Mistakes: - Posted "Check out my product" with no prior participation - No context, no story, no transparency - Didn't reply to the two critical comments received - Posted once and disappeared
Results: Upvotes: 5 Comments: 2 (both critical) Signups from IH: 0 Account activity afterward: zero Reputation: none (profile sits empty)
